replies.msg: My friend is a salesman in the company who gets a basic salary of eight thousand five hundred dollars per month plus a sixteen percent commission on every sale he makes so he doesn't work by commission only. He has to report to his manager every month on progress. He's a devout churchgoer who says his prayers every night before he goes to sleep. He has recurring flashbacks of a car crash he saw in Tokyo after.sseing a car accident on the news so yesterday he asked a pastor in his church to pray for him. His church stresses the importance of daily prayer in the life of a Christian.
